race.comment: KALKANLI (7) had been knocking on the door of another victory with consecutive runner-up finishes over this track and trip before getting the job done here last time out. Winning hoop Thornton retains the ride and should be playing a major role in the finish again. FARWEST (6) has placed three of six around this circuit and will strip fitter third-up from the spell. Gets in well at the weights with the 2kg claim and can make his presence felt. TRUMP CARD (5) maps nicely for this from gate two and must be respected out of the Vandyke camp. Top-three credentials. PULVERISER (1) has placed two of three over this staying test and looks one for the exotics players. MALECON (2) best of the rest.
